# Alice accepts request, verifies network and empty pending
# Bob also logs in to verify bidirectional network and empty pending
1       # Login as alice
alice
Alice1!1
5       # View pending requests
1       # Accept Bob's request
7       # View network (should show Bob)
5       # View pending again (should be empty now)
9       # Logout

# Bob checks his network and pending
1       # Login as bob
bob
Bob123!1
7       # View network (should show Alice)
5       # View pending (should be empty)
9       # Logout
3       # Exit
